name: seq_detect_1011
interface: module seq_detect_1011 (input clk, input rst_n, input x, output reg y);
golden_rtl:
module seq_detect_1011(input clk,input rst_n,input x,output reg y);
 reg [2:0] s; localparam S0=0,S1=1,S2=2,S3=3;
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin s<=S0; y<=0; end
  else begin
   case(s)
    S0: begin y<=0; s<= x?S1:S0; end
    S1: begin y<=0; s<= x?S1:S2; end
    S2: begin y<=0; s<= x?S3:S0; end
    S3: begin if(x) begin y<=1; s<=S1; end else begin y<=0; s<=S2; end end
    default: begin y<=0; s<=S0; end
   endcase
  end
 end
endmodule
buggy_rtl:
module seq_detect_1011(input clk,input rst_n,input x,output reg y);
 reg [2:0] s; localparam S0=0,S1=1,S2=2,S3=3;
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin s<=S0; y<=0; end
  else begin
   case(s)
    S0: begin y<=0; s<= x?S1:S0; end
    S1: begin y<=0; s<= x?S1:S2; end
    S2: begin y<=0; s<= x?S3:S0; end
    S3: begin if(x) begin y<=0; s<=S1; end else begin y<=0; s<=S2; end end
    default: begin y<=0; s<=S0; end
   endcase
  end
 end
endmodule

name: uart_tx
interface: module uart_tx (input clk, input rst_n, input start, input [7:0] data, output reg tx, output reg busy);
golden_rtl:
module uart_tx(input clk,input rst_n,input start,input [7:0] data,output reg tx,output reg busy);
 localparam IDLE=0,STRT=1,DATA=2,STOP=3;
 reg [1:0] st; reg [3:0] idx; reg [7:0] sh;
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; sh<=0; end
  else case(st)
   IDLE: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; if(start) begin sh<=data; busy<=1'b1; st<=STRT; end end
   STRT: begin tx<=1'b0; idx<=0; st<=DATA; end
   DATA: begin tx<=sh[idx]; if(idx==7) st<=STOP; else idx<=idx+1; end
   STOP: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; st<=IDLE; end
   default: begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; end
  endcase
 end
endmodule
buggy_rtl:
module uart_tx(input clk,input rst_n,input start,input [7:0] data,output reg tx,output reg busy);
 localparam IDLE=0,STRT=1,DATA=2,STOP=3;
 reg [1:0] st; reg [3:0] idx; reg [7:0] sh;
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; sh<=0; end
  else case(st)
   IDLE: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; idx<=0; if(start) begin sh<=data; busy<=1'b1; st<=STRT; end end
   STRT: begin tx<=1'b0; idx<=0; st<=DATA; end
   DATA: begin tx<=sh[7-idx]; if(idx==7) st<=STOP; else idx<=idx+1; end
   STOP: begin tx<=1'b1; busy<=1'b0; st<=IDLE; end
   default: begin st<=IDLE; tx<=1'b1; end
  endcase
 end
endmodule

name: vending_change
interface: module vending_change (input clk, input rst_n, input [1:0] coin, output reg dispense, output reg [3:0] change);
golden_rtl:
module vending_change(input clk,input rst_n,input [1:0] coin,
                     output reg dispense,output reg [3:0] change);
 reg [5:0] acc; reg [5:0] add;
 always @(*) begin case(coin) 2'd1: add=5; 2'd2: add=10; default: add=0; endcase end
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin acc<=0; dispense<=0; change<=0; end
  else begin
   if(acc+add>=20) begin dispense<=1; change<=(acc+add)-20; acc<=0; end
   else begin dispense<=0; change<=0; acc<=acc+add; end
  end
 end
endmodule
buggy_rtl:
module vending_change(input clk,input rst_n,input [1:0] coin,
                     output reg dispense,output reg [3:0] change);
 reg [5:0] acc; reg [5:0] add;
 always @(*) begin case(coin) 2'd1: add=5; 2'd2: add=10; default: add=0; endcase end
 always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
  if(!rst_n) begin acc<=0; dispense<=0; change<=0; end
  else begin
   if(acc+add>=25) begin dispense<=1; change<=(acc+add)-25; acc<=0; end
   else begin dispense<=0; change<=0; acc<=acc+add; end
  end
 end
endmodule

name: updown_counter
interface: module ud_cnt (input clk, input rst_n, input up, output reg [3:0] q);
golden_rtl: module ud_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, input up, output reg [3:0] q); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) q<=4'd0; else q<= up ? q+4'd1 : q-4'd1; endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n,up; wire [3:0] q; integer i; reg [3:0] exp; ud_cnt dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.up(up),.q(q)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; up=0; exp=0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; for(i=0;i<80;i=i+1) begin up=$random; @(posedge clk); #1; exp= up ? exp+4'd1 : exp-4'd1; if(q!==exp) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d up=%b q=%0d exp=%0d",i,up,q,exp); $finish; end end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #200000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module ud_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, input up, output reg [3:0] q); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) q<=4'd0; else q<= q+4'd1; endmodule

golden_rtl: module mod10(input clk, input rst_n, output reg [3:0] q); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) q<=4'd0; else q<= (q==4'd9)?4'd0:q+4'd1; endmodule

`timescale 1ns/1ps

name: gray_cnt
interface: module gray_cnt (input clk, input rst_n, output reg [3:0] g);
golden_rtl: module gray_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, output reg [3:0] g); reg [3:0] bin; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin bin<=4'd0; g<=4'd0; end else begin bin<=bin+4'd1; g<= (bin+4'd1) ^ ((bin+4'd1)>>1); end endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n; wire [3:0] g; integer i; reg [3:0] bexp; reg [3:0] gexp, gprev; gray_cnt dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.g(g)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; function integer popcnt; input [3:0] v; integer k; begin popcnt=0; for(k=0;k<4;k=k+1) popcnt=popcnt+v[k]; end endfunction initial begin rst_n=0; bexp=0; gprev=0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; for(i=0;i<40;i=i+1) begin @(posedge clk); #1; bexp=bexp+4'd1; gexp= bexp ^ (bexp>>1); if(g!==gexp) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d g=%b exp=%b",i,g,gexp); $finish; end if(popcnt(g ^ gprev)!==1) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d non-gray transition %b->%b",i,gprev,g); $finish; end gprev=g; end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #200000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module gray_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, output reg [3:0] g); reg [3:0] bin; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin bin<=4'd0; g<=4'd0; end else begin bin<=bin+4'd1; g<= (bin+4'd1); end endmodule
